RADIATION CITY

Survive the irradiated wasteland of a post-apocalyptic city. Scavenge for resources, craft weapons and supplies, and manage your hunger, thirst, radiation, and health meters. Explore buildings to find materials, fight mutated creatures, and reach safe zones. Your goal is to survive long enough to reach the evacuation point at the edge of the map while keeping all your vital stats above zero.

Arrow Keys: Move forward/backward and turn left/right | Space: Attack with equipped weapon | Shift: Sprint (drains hunger faster) | Z: Use consumable item (cycles through food, water, anti-rad)
